"description": "### Impact

Weblate's `VCS_RESTRICT_PRIVATE` did not properly account for some transitional IPv6 ranges, multicast addresses, or some semi-private IPv4 ranges, which allowed some addresses to bypass private range restrictions.

### Patches

* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19768

### Resources

The issue was reported by @tonghuaroot via GitHub, and the same user also provided the initial patch.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00291, "percentile": 0.206}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T23:46:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50127"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T20:17:29Z", "published_at": "2026-07-07T23:46:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50127", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19768", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/releases/tag/weblate-2026.6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate SSRF: outbound URL guard misses some private ranges", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T23:46:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vmfc-9982-2m45", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.15, < 2026.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate SSRF: outbound URL guard misses some private ranges
